catalog_content:
Item Name: Stevia with Allulose Sweetener (40 Ounce (Pack of 1))
Bullet Point 1: PLANT-BASED SWEETENER BLEND - Health Garden’s Stevia with Allulose is a unique blend of stevia, erythritol, and allulose, made from high-quality, non-GMO plant-based sources. A delicious sugar alternative without artificial ingredients.
Bullet Point 2: ZERO CALORIES & KETO-FRIENDLY - Enjoy guilt-free sweetness! Our stevia and allulose sweetener contains zero calories, is low-carb, and keto-friendly. It’s a great choice for those looking to reduce sugar intake as part of a balanced lifestyle.
Bullet Point 3: PERFECT FOR BAKING & BEVERAGES - Allulose caramelizes just like sugar, making it an excellent choice for baking, sauces, and glazes. Stevia dissolves quickly and blends smoothly into hot and cold drinks like coffee, tea, lemonade and smoothies
Bullet Point 4: NON-GMO & ALL-NATURAL - Made from non-GMO corn and stevia sourced from the Philippines, our sweetener is free from artificial additives, gluten, dairy, and known allergens. It’s a natural, kosher-certified alternative to refined sugars.
Bullet Point 5: CONVENIENT RESEALABLE BAG - Keep your sweetener fresh with our easy-to-use resealable bag. Whether you’re baking, sweetening drinks, or cooking, enjoy a pure, high-quality sugar alternative everytime.

Resealable packaging and bulk 40 oz size suggest value-oriented consumption. Targets health-conscious consumers with gluten-free, non-GMO, and kosher claims.

Bullet Point 2: 100% CERTIFIED ORGANIC: No worries. This premium chocolate peanut butter powder features only the finest peanuts, organically grown for purity & roasted for full-bodied flavor. Vegan & non-GMO.
Bullet Point 3: ENDLESS WAYS TO INDULGE: Blend it into shakes & smoothies. Spread it on bread. Bake it in cookies. Even mix it with pancakes & waffles. You’ll never run out of yummy ways to savor this satisfying snack.

Bullet Point 5: ALL-AMERICAN QUALITY: Betty Lou’s Just Great Stuff is carefully crafted by natural-foods specialists right here in the USA. You can count on this gluten-free protein powder for gourmet goodness in your well-balanced diet.
